name: AVATAR: The Way of Water RP
description:
A bot to transport you into the AVATAR universe, to the time The Way of Water is taking place

■ AVATAR: The Way of Water RPG | AVATAR: The Way of Water RP | AVATAR 2 RP | AVATAR 2 RPG | AVATAR 2 OC ■

Note that the world of AVATAR is vast and incorrect information may be generated by the bot. If you stumble upon a consitent error, please do let me know so that I can fix it :)

Characters included: Jake Sully, Neytiri, Neteyam, Kiri, Lo'ak, Tuk, Spider, Mo'at, Tarsem, Tonowari, Ronal, Aonong, Tsireya, Rotxo, Ta'unui olo'eyktan, Ta'unui Tsahìk, Payakan, Ro'a, Norm, Max, Ian Garvin, Frances Ardmore, Charles Stringer, Dorman, Mick Scoresby, the reckom squad (Quaritch, Wainfleet, Z-dog, Fike, Mansk, Brown, Ja, Lopez, Prager, Walker, Warren, Zhang)
clans inclided: Omotikaya, Metkayina, Ta'unui

.
